title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra vs Galaxy S26 Ultra: Which is the better Ultra? - Engadget
summary: Hardware features differentiate the S26 Ultra from the Fold 8 Ultra, too. The Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra biggest selling point compared to the S26 Ultra is probably that foldable display.
